creator: lists+freebsd@xinu.tv
text:
Apparently I didn't get the email with Ross's comment
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/174487#reply2 When I saw the
problem while trying to update to notmuch-0.15.1 I revisited the bug and saw the
suggestion, which works.

Can we add a line to /usr/ports/UPDATING?  

Bill

On Sun, Dec 16, 2012 at 11:56:09PM +0000, edwin@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: mail/notmuch fails to build during portupgrade
